title: The Rope Over the Dock
summary: A fraying line tossed over the harbor beam could give you the high ground.

inventory.name: Length of Rope
inventory.description: A sturdy coil of hemp rope suitable for climbing or securing rigging.

start.prompt: The warehouse canopy pitches overhead with thick beams and a sagging rigging mast. A loop of rope drapes over the nearest beam, waiting to be secured.
